title: Student Management System
description: My first technical project: a local Java and MySQL student management system featuring layered architecture, validated CRUD, flexible search, and SQL reporting.

title: SpringMart
description: A demo e-commerce platform powered by a Spring Boot backend. It features RESTful CRUD APIs, search functionality, pagination, data validation, image handling, and Docker support, integrated with an AI-generated frontend.

title: wrkout
description: A workout tracker designed for strength-training individuals who value structure. Built specifically for a Push/Pull/Legs (PPL) split, it tracks progress and makes daily workouts more engaging and satisfying.

title: Shreyan's Arc
description: A highly curated, interactive DSA roadmap that eliminates the noise of endless question banks. It guides first-time learners sequentially through foundational patterns and serves as a high-ROI revision tool for developers preparing for product-based technical interviews.

title: J-Void
description: A hands-on Java platform for focused problem-solving. It integrates directly with the "Shreyan's Arc" DSA roadmap and provides LeetCode links for immediate submissions.

title: WealthWise
description: A custom portfolio website built for a financial advisor to establish an online presence, showcase their personal brand, and streamline client outreach.
